assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates strategies: L4 pool uses autoscaled blue-green upgrade, A100 pool uses maintenance exclusion + manual coordination during job gaps

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response uses blue-green upgrade with maxSurge=0 and maxUnavailable=0, not the expected surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions CUDA driver compatibility testing and states 'Common issue: TensorRT engines compiled for older CUDA won't run on newer drivers'

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Wait for training jobs to complete naturally' and uses maintenance exclusions to coordinate with job gaps

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response states 'No live migration: Every GPU pod restarts during node upgrade' under GPU-Specific Considerations

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'PDBs on inference workloads reviewed (not overly restrictive)' in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response addresses autoscaler interactions, noting 'Cluster autoscaler can only scale one node pool at a time' and 'During blue-green upgrade, both pools may scale simultaneously'

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'CUDA driver compatibility verified for 1.32 (test in staging cluster first)' and 'Critical: Test inference and training workloads in staging first'
